error_signature: white space on the top of PWA
title: White space issue in PWA on Android
symptom: When the PWA is installed on Android, there is an unwanted white space at the top of the app interface.
not_this_if: The app is not installed as a PWA
The issue occurs only in web view and not in PWA
root_cause: The white space issue may arise due to the default theme color settings not being properly configured for the PWA, leading to rendering inconsistencies in the app's appearance.
fix_steps: Add a JavaScript Action on App Load in your WeWeb project.
Use the provided code snippet to set the theme color appropriately.
agent_instruction: Implement the JavaScript Action to set the theme color and remove the white space.
